generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that foreign tech giants are exploiting our reliance on their supply chains? While politicians talk about 'strategic autonomy,' they're letting critical infrastructure fall into the hands of competitors. Remember the power grid vulnerabilities last winter? That's what happens when we don't prioritize national resilience. It's time to demand real action - not just empty slogans about 'global cooperation.' #SecureOurFuture #StrategicAutonomy
